title: elatine hexandra subsp. brochonii
intro: Elatine hexandra subsp. brochonii, also known as Elatine brochonii, is a species of aquatic plant within the Elatinaceae family. It is a perennial, submerged aquatic plant found in fresh water habitats. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, and is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and treating digestive issues. Elatine brochonii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and may also be used in topical applications for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
